name: Sync UI
summary: Frontend sync view with progress tracking and status display
goals: Provide a visual interface for triggering and monitoring graph sync
Show sync progress with phase details and error reporting

specDetail.description: A SyncView component with SyncProgress display that shows the sync workflow. Provides buttons to start incremental or full sync, displays progress bars for each phase (discovery, analysis, generation), and reports errors.

parameters.name: progress
parameters.description: Progress details with phase, percentage, and current step

parameters.name: onStartSync
parameters.description: Callback to start sync (full or incremental)

parameters.name: lastSyncResult
parameters.description: Result of the last sync operation including stats and errors

constraints: Must show real-time progress updates during sync (polled or SSE)
Must allow cancelling an in-progress sync
Must display sync errors with actionable messages

acceptanceCriteria.when: the user triggers an incremental sync
acceptanceCriteria.then: a progress display shows each sync phase with percentage completion

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
